sections.title: Report Metadata
sections.description: Defines the report type, generated context, and baseline delivery metadata.

sections.title: Scope
sections.description: Summarizes the affected services, scopes, and intended audience.

sections.title: Methodology
sections.description: Explains how findings, governance outputs, and reporting were derived.

sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.description: Summarizes business-facing risk themes and key priorities.

sections.title: Risk Overview
sections.description: Provides normalized severity distribution and top risk indicators.

sections.title: Key Findings
sections.description: Highlights the most important findings or risks in a controlled structure.

sections.title: Remediation Roadmap
sections.description: Provides sequenced delivery guidance where the report type supports roadmap content.

sections.title: Compliance / Control Mapping
sections.description: Surfaces related governance or control-domain context.

sections.title: Evidence / Appendix
sections.description: Preserves traceability to evidence references, finding IDs, and scope.
